title: GMS Week 12 - EID PAUSE!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 23/03/2026
Image reference: 2026-03-23_gms-week-12-eid-pause_img1.jpg
Eid al-Fitr has arrived to greet the world's ship recycling markets this week, and as is tradition, it came bearing the giftof silence. From Chattogram to Gadani, Alang to Aliağa, the holy festival has pressed pause on an industry that was already beginning to feel the compounding weight of war, currency volatility, and a stubborn absence of fresh tonnage offerings. The backdrop to this year's Eid break is, to put it charitably, anything but restful.
